name: Snickers Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cake mix according to the package instructions.
2. Pour half of the batter into a greased 9x13 pan.
3. Bake in a preheated oven set to 350°F for 15-20 minutes.
4. Melt caramels, butter, and milk together.
5. Pour the caramel mixture over the baked portion.
6. Sprinkle chocolate chips and chopped nuts over the caramel.
7. Pour the remaining cake batter over everything.
8. Bake at 250°F for 20 minutes, then increase to 350°F for an additional 10 minutes.
